## [00:00 - 02:11]

G'day Troy Dean here from Melbourne, Australia and I just wanted to give a big shout out to Jeff Walker and the team at Product Launch Formula. Before we enrolled in Product Launch Formula we had a pretty successful membership website that we'd built up over a two year period but we'd kind of plateaued and we were finding it hard to break through our own glass ceiling if you like. And I've been following Jeff online for quite some time and I was very familiar with his work. I hadn't pulled the trigger on Product Launch Formula and frankly I was frustrated. I tried everything to try and grow our membership base. Soon as Product Launch Formula opened the next time we enrolled and I'm one of those passionate students that enrolls in a course and then watches every video, downloads every template, fills in every worksheet and executes on exactly what the teacher suggests and I've got to say it's completely changed our business and changed my life. We're now seven figure business which I'm very proud of. We have over 700 members in our programs. We've executed four Product Launch Formula style launches in the last 12 months and it's been a complete game changer for us. The one thing I love about Product Launch Formula is it creates enormous buzz around your product. It gives you an opportunity to add enormous value and goodwill into your market because you're just giving away this amazing free content as part of your pre-launch content which hopefully you'll find out about when you enroll. And it's massively grown our email list as well. In fact, it's probably doubled our email list. So perhaps the best thing about this though is the irony about having an online business is my favourite part of this now is travelling all over the world and meeting my customers in real life and hanging out with them and running real life workshops which we just couldn't have done if we hadn't reached certain numbers and Product Launch Formula has definitely helped us get the critical mass of members that we needed to be able to run some of these live events. Big shout out to Jeff and the team. Love what you guys are doing. Please keep rolling it out and for anyone out there considering joining Product Launch Formula hand on heart I promise it does work if you're prepared to roll up your sleeves and do the work. So thanks again Jeff and I look forward to seeing the rest of you inside Product Launch Formula one day.
